reviews.review_msg:
She is a very nice and encouraging teacher.
As for the exam, she focuses on assessing your ability to explain real world problems in terms of the concepts she taught in her class, not just memorizing formulas and definitions. You really need to understand the key concepts thoroughly and to be able to apply them practically to do well in her class.

I took this one year ago. You don't need to read the e-book, but you MUST purchase it because you have to subscribe to the e-book to have access to the quizzes that are worth your grade. The final exam was a disaster where the difficulty and relevancy to the course were questionable. Even doubt whether those questions are generated by ChatGPT.

You get graded on 2 midterms, 1 final, and a set of online quizzes. All are worth 25% each. The content taught in class is basic however exam questions are not at the same level. Quizzes are strenuous and the course is not well organized. You HAVE to take notes in class and there are no office hours available. I Would not suggest this professor.

Need to do your two assignments correctly (only P/F), and each 10% I lose 10% for assignment 1, that the reason why even I got good score in every exam, I couldn't get a better grade. Content is always easy, compare to the other Prof in FIC, but you still need to work hard as well. At least, no many students in her class join the cram school.

Vera is a nice prof definitely. Everyone got 100% for the online quizzes, only counts your highest score. Try it once, then refresh all your score before the final. If you refresh it too early, you can't make a good use of the study plan, which could be in the exam. She always pops some questions to let us think. Easiest Econ content in FIC.

Vera is very nice and sweet. I love how she always congratulates students on their exams and encourages them to work harder next time. Her lecture slides are not so organized, but it doesn't affect that much. Her quizzes are online and similar to the exams so if you work hard at home, it will pay off. Definitely a good prof!

Vera is the best economics instructor that I ever met!! She's patient, friendly and sweet. She can explain some obscure concepts in an interesting way. Besides, she always encourages students to keep up. I am so appreciative that I met such a nice instructor even though ECON is just my elective course. I can't get B+ without her!!

Vera is very kind and easy to approach. However, her class is different from her exams a lot. If you work hard, I think you will get a good grade. And her class is all hand-writing, it is better to take all classes. Her homework is online and if you do the practice before finishing all the assignments, you will get good marks.

Vera Lantinova is definitely one of the kindest professors Ive met so far. She is quite calm and has a soothing voice (which is sometimes a little bit too low), so listening to her is very pleasant. She definitely knows the subjects she is talking about and she is passionate about them. Definitely taking macroeconomics with her next!
she teach so simple in class and exams oh my God dammnn tough!!!
